Current agent requested bash command 'TUI=/home/sang/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v24.12.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist' (full command: 'TUI=/home/sang/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v24.12.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist
echo "=== forwardInputSequence body (229-260) ==="
sed -n '229,270p' "$TUI/terminal.js"
echo ""
echo "=== StdinBuffer: how it splits sequences ==="
cat "$TUI/stdin-buffer.d.ts" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- stdin-buffer.js key logic ---"
grep -n "split\|\\\\x1b\|csi\|CSI\|intermediate\|final\|0x40\|0x7e\|param\|private" "$TUI/stdin-buffer.js" | head -40'). Allow this command?

Current agent requested bash command 'TUI=/home/sang/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v24.12.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist' (full command: 'TUI=/home/sang/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v24.12.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist
echo "=== tui.js: addInputListener + handleInput ==="
grep -n "addInputListener\|handleInput\|inputListeners\|onDebug" "$TUI/tui.js" | head
echo ""
echo "=== handleInput body ==="
awk '/handleInput\(data\)/{f=1} f{print NR": "$0} f&&/^    }/{c++; if(c>=1)exit}' "$TUI/tui.js" | head -40'). Allow this command?
